customManagers._comment: Tag-pinned git-subrepos (e.g. shadowsocks-rust at v1.24.0). Renovate bumps 'branch = vX.Y.Z' to the newest upstream release; .github/workflows/subrepo-pull.yml completes the pull.

Branch-pinned git-subrepos (e.g. v2ray-plugin on master; upstream stopped cutting releases in 2022). Renovate bumps 'commit = <sha>' when the branch moves; .github/workflows/subrepo-pull.yml completes the pull.
